- @CandyDigital will begin migrating Candy collectibles to @solana in early says of May, exact date to be announed soon.

- @arkham Launched a fully decentralized DEX on Solana!

- @solana PropAMMs recorded $19.8B in volume last month, surpassing $19.2B combined $SOL spot volume across the top four centralized exchanges.

Hey @MeCo_ICE since your project is now a top 20 crypto coin, it's time to uncover your whole scam

MemeCore is a L1 blockchain powered by its $46.1 FDV token, $M

The problem? No one is using it

Here are all the lies:

▫️ "Proof of Meme" consensus:

"Proof of Meme" is just standard PoA/dPoS with a 10-block rotation among the same 7 validators

All validators belong to the team that prints 350K tokens per day, worth $1M

▫️ Supply control:

~99.5%+ is insider-controlled:

- Binance Alpha wallets: 48.85%
- Insider wallet cluster: 23.46%
- Genesis (team) wallets: 25.82%
- Meson Finance + Kraken (funded by that same cluster): 1.42%

Only ~230M is actually unlocked and of that 0.1% is held by retail

▫️ Fake volume:

CEX volume (perps and wash trading) is $23M/day but no one is actually trading $M on a DEX (just $300K/day)

Onchain orderbook is basically empty with only $63K in liquidity

And it gets worse: their main DEX  (EverySwap) does $1.3K in daily volume. Literally no one is using the chain

To fake their volume they've introduced "MemeMax" that requires users to generate fees equal to 50% of their reward in order to withdraw

▫️ "Utility":

Their only real utility is farming low-quality accounts through giveaways and sending the co-founder to a Trump dinner

ps. @MeCo_ICE I heard you've sold your TRUMP tokens for a loss of $4M... maybe it's time to change your bio

Tether froze $344M USDT on Tron, one of the largest compliance actions in its history.

Two addresses flagged:

- TNiq9…QZH81: ~$213M
- TTiDL…pjSr9: ~$131M

Executed with OFAC + multiple U.S. law enforcement agencies. Allegedly tied to sanctions evasion and criminal networks.

> Tether has now frozen over $4.4 BILLION in assets and works with 340 law enforcement agencies in 65 countries.

Just weeks after Circle declined to freeze $230M stolen in the $285M Drift Protocol exploit, citing no formal OFAC request even as funds moved through CCTP during U.S. business hours.

Tether stepped in instead, committing $127.5M to Drift's recovery. Drift has since switched to USDT as primary settlement on Solana.

Lifetime tally:
- $4.4B frozen
- 2,300+ cases supported
- 340 agencies across 65 countries
- $2.1B tied directly to U.S. authorities

Paolo Ardoino: "USDT is not a safe haven for illicit activity."

Stream's take:

Solana's founder stack had a gap.

Colosseum launches you from 0→1. Then... void until Series A.

Most startups die in that valley. Not from lack of traction, from lack of leverage.

Black fills that valley with operators + perks + network.

For APAC founders specifically - @SaigonButcher's background means this isn't another US/EU program with "global" stamped on it.

If you're past traction and your next 12 months decide whether you scale or stall → this is the room to be in.

Society can kill you before even die

- 9/5 jobs you hate
- No purpose or direction
- Repetitive, boring routine
- Social media doomscrolling
- Tobacco/Alcohol to escape
- Junk food for comfort
- Pornography and loneliness
- Chronic stress and no sunlight
- Sitting all day and moving less
- Living for the weekend
- Debt you can’t breathe under
- Sleep deprivation and burnout
- Comparison with everyone online
- Ignoring your health until it breaks
- Surrounding yourself with negativity
- Trading time for money with no plan
- Letting fear make your decisions

Conscious living can bring you back to life

- Work for something you love
- Invent your purpose and direction
- Simple routines that keep you at peace
- Using technology with intention
- Choosing healthy ways to cope
- Nourishing food that fuels your body
- Real connection and meaningful relationships
- Time outdoors and regular sunlight
- Moving your body every day
- Enjoying the present, not just the weekend
- Living within your means and accepting
- Prioritizing deep, consistent sleep
- Focusing on your own journey
- Taking care of your health early
- Surrounding yourself with uplifting people
- Investing your time with purpose
- Making decisions from courage

RT @SaigonButcher: Some of the very best teams in the Solana ecosystem have gone through the Solana Incubator. Don't miss your chance.

Highlighted Solana Projects  📸

🔸@doublezero launched Edge Beta and rolled out a validator migration update: 82 validators (~42M $SOL) have moved from Europe to Asia & North America, improving network speed and geographic distribution.

🔸@metaplex introduced Agent Tokens, powering agent-native capital markets on Solana.

🔸@dflow launched Agent CLI, enabling AI agents to trade spot, equities, and prediction markets with a single command.

🔸@jup_lend enabled xStocks (SPYx, QQQx, NVDAx, TSLAx…) as collateral, offering up to 3.8x leverage.

🔸@hylo_so unveiled a new trading interface and rebrand, focusing on liquidation-resistant leverage.

🔸@bulktrade added 6 new perpetual markets (XRP, SUI, BNB, ZEC, DOGE, Fartcoin) with up to 50x leverage.

🔸@matrixdock brought tokenized physical gold (XAUm) to Solana.

🔸@Noah_HQ highlighted a major payments case study—sovereign payroll using virtual USD/EUR accounts with instant off-ramps.

🔸@blankdotbuild launched Blank, a post-launch operating system for tokens.

🔸@printr introduced Proof of Belief on Solana — an omnichain launchpad with customizable fees, Proof of Belief staking rewards, anti-vamp protection, and full creator-holder alignment.

Q: Do you close when a token flatlines?

“Well, it depends. It’s been a long time since I’ve had an LP on a coin that flatlines, or at least I would have gotten out before it flatlines most of the time. If it flatlines, it means you’re too late. It means the rug already happened. You should have gotten out way before that.”

“But normally, let’s say it dumps 80% and it doesn’t recover, it doesn’t make a big bounce, it still fits my exit criteria where it pumps above the Bollinger Bands upper line, and that’s where I cut. I close the position, even if it’s negative, I’ll just cut it there because that is my exit signal.”

Reject modernity. Return to open source immutable software. I am actually more bullish on being able to remove admin keys than any other time in my professional software development career.  The tools we have for formal verification are sci fi. 

https://t.co/Xv4mMeKtxE

I have deployed an immutable binary of percolator, and a market with about 5 sol in the insurance vault with all the admin keys burned.  There is no way for me to modify anything about the market, or the program.  Anyone can crank it if they choose to.  

It is purely a risk engine and cannot trade or offer prices on its own.  For that you need to figure out how to deploy your own program to do it. 

Figure out how to hack it or manipulate the engine and steal the 5 sol, and I will do my best to land you a job or an angel investment.  Especially if you can figure out how to get AI to hack it instead of doing it yourself.  

This has been my security attack search script if you need a starting place.

https://t.co/WdRwJMKrHL

Find a bug, submit an issue to the repo.  Good luck!

RT @JupiterExchange: Prediction markets were never meant to be a solo game.

Most platforms treat them like one.

We’re building something…
https://t.co/hT9XWnDfGX
https://t.co/yAquSVPRvs

Prediction markets and perps have been converging on two fronts: in the assets they cover (both real-world assets and crypto-native ones — @Polymarket and @OstiumLabs were both used heavily to hedge oil price exposure during the Iran crisis), and in structure (Polymarket's fast markets have grown shorter and shorter — from hourly, to 15m, to 5min, and now instant — while perps venues like @HyperliquidX are moving the other way, adding event contracts via HIP-4).

We've documented these trends in recent articles on the Dune blog, for readers interested in the on-chain data behind this shift.

Stocks, metals, and now a football club on @solana.

@AlfretonTownFC, a sixth division English football club, just put fan ownership on-chain and it's actually interesting. You buy their governance token and you get a direct vote on the budget, the kit, and who runs the board, etc. Completely public raise, no insiders get in early.

1 token = 1 vote

Minimum buy-in is around $100 and you can even pay with a card.

Premier League clubs doing this is probably a long shot given how deep private equity already is in that world. But it is still a step in the right direction and a big win for crypto.

Would be nice to see someone higher up pay attention.
